value.string: Catches all the error while executing the bot
Logging error to run log file
Open online currency exchange rate website
To put input amount in text box

<input type="text" name="amount" id="amount" class="converterAmount" onfocus="if(this.value == '120') this.value='';" onblur="if(this.value == '') this.value='120' ;" value="120" maxlength="50" tabindex="1">
To put input from amount data into text box
<input type="text" id="from" class="converterCurrencyFrom ac_input" tabindex="2" value="" autocomplete="off" selectvalue="USD - US Dollar">
Put  To data into  text box
<input type="text" id="to" class="converterCurrencyTo ac_input" tabindex="3" value="" autocomplete="off" selectvalue="HKD - Hong Kong Dollar">
To put From data into text box
<input type="text" id="from" class="converterCurrencyFrom ac_input" tabindex="2" value="" autocomplete="off" selectvalue="USD - US Dollar">
Set cell result value in excel
